sections.title: Spread
sections.body: Synthetic spread value is the normalized leg expression used for discretionary interpretation and system studies.

sections.title: Mean
sections.body: Longer lookback mean anchors the relative-value read and determines whether current price is statistically stretched.

sections.title: ATR
sections.body: Average true range measures realized spread volatility and drives band distance, risk unit sizing, and stress-rule checks.

sections.title: Z-Score
sections.body: Z-score is calculated from spread distance to mean divided by ATR, with intraday VWAP pressure used as a secondary session read.

rows: Raw midpoint reference for discretionary interpretation.
(Spread - Mean) / ATR plus an intraday VWAP z-score using ATR/2.
Cross-spread ranking and intraday trigger pressure.
Current ATR versus one-year ATR distribution.
Size down when volatility is unusually elevated.
